title: Constraint6DOF
description: Constraint6DOF: Constraint objects with six degrees of freedom, three translational and three rotational, used for supports and bar end releases.

Name.description: A unique Name is required for some structural packages to create and identify the object.

TranslationalStiffnessX.description: Defines the stiffness in X-direction. This will only be active when corresponding degree of freedom has a DOFType with a stiffness dependency, such as Spring. Property has a quantity of type ForcePerUnitLength meassured in [N/m].

TranslationalStiffnessY.description: Defines the stiffness in Y-direction. This will only be active when corresponding degree of freedom has a DOFType with a stiffness dependency, such as Spring. Property has a quantity of type ForcePerUnitLength meassured in [N/m].

TranslationalStiffnessZ.description: Defines the stiffness in Z-direction. This will only be active when corresponding degree of freedom has a DOFType with a stiffness dependency, such as Spring. Property has a quantity of type ForcePerUnitLength meassured in [N/m].

RotationalStiffnessX.description: Defines the stiffness for rotation about the X-axis. This will only be active when corresponding degree of freedom has a DOFType with a stiffness dependency, such as Spring. Property has a quantity of type MomentPerUnitAngle meassured in [N.m/rad].

RotationalStiffnessY.description: Defines the stiffness for rotation about the Y-axis. This will only be active when corresponding degree of freedom has a DOFType with a stiffness dependency, such as Spring. Property has a quantity of type MomentPerUnitAngle meassured in [N.m/rad].

RotationalStiffnessZ.description: Defines the stiffness for rotation about the Z-axis. This will only be active when corresponding degree of freedom has a DOFType with a stiffness dependency, such as Spring. Property has a quantity of type MomentPerUnitAngle meassured in [N.m/rad].

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
